Detailed_Description:
Convenience method for controlling tick locators.  See matplotlib.axes.Axes.locator_params() for full
documentation. Note that this is for Axes3D objects,
therefore, setting axis to 'both' will result in the
parameters being set for all three axes. Also, axis can also take a value of 'z' to apply parameters to the
z axis.
